In Paris, Sports Scene's Greg Laffradi was joined by former colleague Wang Dong, who is now a Professor of Sports Journalism at Shanghai International Studies University (SISU), to talk about the performance of China's tennis players at the 2024 Summer Olympics.

title: Wang Dong returns to discuss Chinese tennis players at Paris Olympics - CGTN
author: CGTN
description: In Paris, Sports Scene's Greg Laffradi was joined by former colleague Wang Dong, who is now a Professor of Sports Journalism at Shanghai International Studies University (SISU), to talk about the performance of China's tennis players at the 2024 Summer
